verbGlossary.APPLIES FOR: {source} or developer submits a formal application to a regulatory body to obtain {target} or approval
verbGlossary.APPROVES TAP FOR: {source}authorizes a physical tap connection to municipal water or sewer mains
verbGlossary.AUDITS: {source} reviews plans, records, or site conditions to verify compliance with applicable standards
verbGlossary.COMPLIES WITH: {source} adheres to {target} by maintaining proper documentation, certifications, and wage records
verbGlossary.CONDUCTS: {source} physically performs an inspection, plan review, or testing activity as the authority having jurisdiction
verbGlossary.COORDINATES: {source} aligns inspection schedules with construction sequencing to avoid work stoppages
verbGlossary.CORRELATES WITH: {source}measure statistically relates to {target} or compliance metric
verbGlossary.DEVELOPS: {source} creates a required regulatory plan such as a site safety plan or stormwater prevention plan
verbGlossary.ENFORCES: Government entity compels compliance with labor, safety, or environmental regulations through oversight and penalties
verbGlossary.FILES: {source} submits a required regulatory notification to the governing authority before work begins
verbGlossary.FURNISHES REPORTS FOR: Inspection agency delivers completed test and inspection reports required for {target} issuance
verbGlossary.GRANTS: {source} formally issues an approval, {target}, or entitlement after satisfactory review
verbGlossary.ISSUES: {source} or authority formally issues {target} or certificate upon approval of the application
verbGlossary.MANAGES REVIEW FOR: {source}plan review process between the design team and the reviewing authority
verbGlossary.MEASURED BY: {source}is quantified against a regulatory documentation completeness standard
verbGlossary.MONITORS: {source}tracks {target} cycle times and regulatory milestones to identify schedule risks
verbGlossary.PERFORMS: {source} or testing lab executes the required inspection or test per code mandate
verbGlossary.PETITIONS FOR: {source} or developer formally requests {target}, variance, or special exception from the planning authority
verbGlossary.PREPARES JUSTIFICATION FOR: Code consultant assembles technical rationale and code analysis supporting a variance or special exception request
verbGlossary.PREPARES SWPPP FOR: {source} develops the stormwater pollution prevention plan required for the stormwater {target}
verbGlossary.PREPARES WORK FOR: {source} readies installed work for inspection by the authority having jurisdiction, ensuring accessibility and compliance
verbGlossary.PULLS: {source} obtains a required {target} from the issuing authority, taking responsibility for the permitted scope of work
verbGlossary.RECEIVES: {source} is formally delivered {target}, certificate, or regulatory notice from the issuing authority
verbGlossary.SEALS DRAWINGS FOR: Licensed engineer stamps and signs construction documents required for {target} issuance
verbGlossary.SPECIFIES REQUIREMENTS FOR: {source}defines the scope, frequency, and acceptance criteria for special inspections per {target}
verbGlossary.SUBMITS: {source} delivers a formal {target} package to the reviewing authority for processing
verbGlossary.SUBMITS CALCULATIONS FOR: {source} provides hydraulic calculations and system design data for {target} review and approval
verbGlossary.SUBMITS DRAWINGS FOR: {source} of record submits construction documents to the building department for plan review and {target} issuance
verbGlossary.SUBMITS LIFE SAFETY PLANS FOR: {source} provides life safety, egress, and fire separation drawings to {target} for review
verbGlossary.TRACKS: {source}monitors {target} status, review comments, and approval milestones throughout the project
verbGlossary.VERIFIES COMPLIANCE WITH: {source}monitoring firm confirms that site activities meet the conditions of {target} through sampling and reporting
